// Keys: List of key WCIDs to make into skeleton keys (map is in PatchClass.cs until configurable).
// UseLockpickPathForSkeletonKeys: When true, skeleton keys use the lockpick unlock (very high effective skill). Pickable locks only; does not replace the door empty-LockCode bypass.
// EnableUnlockChestUsingSkeletonBank: When true: use a locked chest in the world with no skeleton key in inventory/pack/key ring; if LeyLineLedger has a balance on the matching tier PropertyInt64, spend one charge and unlock. Props must match LeyLineLedger Items[].Prop for each tier. Requires server restart after changing.
// LegendaryChestWcids: Bank fallback: spend SkeletonBankPropMax1000 (Legendary) for these WCIDs when normal resist-based match does not run.
// ManaForgeChestWcids: Bank fallback: spend SkeletonBankPropMax750 (Mana Forge) for these WCIDs.
// SturdySteelChestWcids: Bank fallback: spend SkeletonBankPropMax500 (Sturdy Steel) for these WCIDs.
// SturdyIronChestWcids: Bank fallback: spend SkeletonBankPropMax250 (Sturdy Iron) for these WCIDs.
// SuppressImmediateChestOpenAfterSkelet: When true: first Chest.Open within the time window after a skeleton key or bank unlock is skipped (client follow-up use). Set false for stock ACE behavior (unlock opens UI immediately).
// SuppressImmediateChestOpenWindowMs: Milliseconds after unlock in which the first matching chest Open is suppressed; increase if the client is slow.
